query:
CREATE TABLE `assessments` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`caseId` int NOT NULL,
	`assessmentDate` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`assessmentData` text NOT NULL,
	`signatureUrl` text,
	`status` enum('draft','completed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `assessments_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user cumuvenGmWLCv3D.root --database GVyUbjiV5SKYzvJXbAkNzD --execute CREATE TABLE `assessments` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`caseId` int NOT NULL,
	`assessmentDate` timestamp NOT NULL,
	`assessmentData` text NOT NULL,
	`signatureUrl` text,
	`status` enum('draft','completed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `assessments_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
